title: Herbie's Law Campaign
meta_description: I joined campaigners & experts to add my support to the Herbie's Law campaign for animal free research in the UK. I support the phase out of animal testing & welcomed the UK Labour Government's plan for this published last year. Read more about Herbie's Law https://bit.ly/4tviDNP ...

I support the phase out of animal testing & welcomed the UK Labour Government’s plan for this published last year.
